scripts.android: yarn bundle:login && yarn bundle:home && yarn bundle:transfer && yarn bundle:movements && react-native run-android
scripts.bundle:login: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.login.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/bundles/login.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.bundle:home: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.home.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/bundles/home.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.bundle:transfer: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.transfer.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/bundles/transfer.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.bundle:movements: react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.movements.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/bundles/movements.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
